title: Non-record: GradPower for Muon prefers p<1 in matched H100 ablation
author: PapaFranku4647

data.description: Gradient power transformation applied to Muon matrix gradients before momentum and orthogonalization; best exponent found below 1 (p=0.9) rather than the paper default p=1.2.

novel_contributions: Applied GradPower-style gradient exponentiation to Muon in the Parameter Golf training stack
Found that p<1 transfers better than the paper default p=1.2 in this Muon-heavy regime
Reported a matched H100 ablation showing p=0.9 beats vanilla Muon at seed 1337
Ran a local 3-seed 4080 sweep showing a consistent improvement for p<1
Provided a negative-result note that p=1.2 is harmful in this setting
